title: 5 Logging in to Data Hub
body_text:
5	Logging in to Data Hub
5.1	Logging in to Data Hub
To log in to Data Hub:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	You芒聙聶ll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if it芒聙聶s your first login to the Client Centre, you芒聙聶ve deleted your cookies, or you芒聙聶re using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
.
See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
Payments Dashboard
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If you芒聙聶ve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under 芒聙聹My Favourites芒聙聺.
Figure 3: Accessing the Data Hub Payments Dashboard
An additional step is required to log in to Microsoft Online Servies. You must use your Client Centre ID with an extension
of
芒聙聹
@central1client.com芒聙聺.
Important:
Your login experience may differ based on previous logins, your computer, or the browser used. Common login scenarios are provided below. If you experience login difficulties, open a private/incognito browser session and ensure that you log in with your Client Centre ID with an extension
of
芒聙聹
@central1client.com芒聙聺
(e.g., testuser@central1client.com).
Scenario 1
Select
Use another account
if prompted. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Select 芒聙聹Use Another Account芒聙聺
Enter your Client Centre username with an extension of 芒聙聹@central1client.com芒聙聺 (e.g., testuser@central1client.com), then select
Next
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Select 芒聙聹Next芒聙聺
Alternatively, if you芒聙聶ve previously logged in with your Client Centre user ID followed by 芒聙聹@central1client.com芒聙聺, you may be able to select it from the list of accounts displayed on the 芒聙聹Pick an account芒聙聺 page.
Select
Yes
to stay signed in if prompted. Optionally, check the 芒聙聹Don芒聙聶t show this again芒聙聺 checkbox. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Select 芒聙聹Yes芒聙聺
View the Data Hub home page once you芒聙聶re successfully authenticated.
Scenario 2
Enter your Client Centre user ID with an extension of 芒聙聹@central1client.com芒聙聺, then select
Submit
(e.g., testuser@central1client.com). See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Enter Client Centre ID with Extension
Select
Next
, if prompted. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Select 芒聙聹Next芒聙聺
Enter your Client Centre password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 9.
Figure 9: Enter Client Centre Password
Select
Continue
, if prompted. See Figure 10.
Figure 10: Select 芒聙聹Continue芒聙聺
Select
Yes
to stay signed in. Optionally, check the 芒聙聹Don芒聙聶t show this again芒聙聺 checkbox. See Figure 11.
Figure 11: Select 芒聙聹Yes芒聙聺
View the Data Hub home page once you芒聙聶re successfully authenticated.
END
